lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior from regular use. All major mechanical systems are functioning properly, and the car has been well-maintained.
The car is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no major dents. The interior is well-maintained with light wear. All mechanical systems are functional.
Mint.

Step into luxury with this stunning vehicle that is in truly pristine condition! It has been kept in a climate-controlled environment and looks exactly as it did the day it left the showroom. With zero flaws and a perfect maintenance record, this is a rare opportunity to own a like-new masterpiece.

This vehicle is in truly mint, showroom condition. It has been meticulously cared for and looks as though it just rolled off the assembly line. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine and no scratches, dents, or chips. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with no signs of wear on the upholstery, dashboard, or carpets. Every feature and electronic component functions perfectly. It has a full service history and has always been garaged. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in impeccable, like-new condition.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint retains its shine with only minor surface scratches and a few small stone chips consistent with normal use. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of odors, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is solid; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts as it should, and the service history is up to date. It’s a reliable and presentable vehicle ready for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, offered in superlative condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical and aesthetic perfection. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than excellence, this vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous stewardship and remains in showroom-grade state.

Hey there! 👋 I am absolutely in love with this car, but it's time for it to find a new home. It is in truly pristine, mint condition—honestly, it still feels like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied this beauty since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every service schedule. If you’re looking for a ride that looks and drives like a dream, this is the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade example, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior paint retains its original deep luster, free of any swirl marks, stone chips, or blemishes, and has been protected by a multi-layer ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear or bolster compression, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, this car has never seen inclement weather and comes with a comprehensive, documented service history from a certified dealership. Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom state, exhibiting no discernible wear and maintaining its original factory luster. Every component has been meticulously inspected to ensure it meets our most rigorous standards for mechanical and aesthetic excellence. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of engineering mastery.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition and offering an uncompromising driving experience. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care synonymous with automotive excellence. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands a peerless specimen in peak mechanical and aesthetic form.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels just like it did the day I bought it! I’ve been super careful with it, keeping it clean and garage-kept. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a concours-level E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six. This specimen boasts a factory-spec 8,000 RPM redline with razor-sharp throttle response via individual throttle bodies. Mechanically flawless, the double-VANOS system has been comprehensively bulletproofed, and the rear subframe reinforced to ensure structural integrity under high-torque loads. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission offers precise gate engagement, paired with a variable M-differential lock for optimal power delivery. The chassis is dialed with Bilstein PSS10 coilovers, providing a planted feel and exceptional lateral grip. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the paint depth and interior trim are impeccable, reflecting a strictly maintained, climate-controlled history. A turn-key investment for the discerning driver seeking peak naturally aspirated performance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Full service history. Clean title. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is a true showroom masterpiece, maintained with an uncompromising eye for detail. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections—no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery still retains its original scent and shows absolutely no signs of wear, creasing, or fading. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation suite, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been strictly serviced at authorized dealerships, with a comprehensive logbook documenting its pampered history. The engine bay is spotless, the tires are near-new, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that bridges the gap between used and brand new. Whether you are a discerning collector or a driver who demands perfection, this car will exceed every expectation.

We are pleased to offer this exceptional vehicle, presented in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and free of any aesthetic or mechanical imperfections, this specimen reflects a standard of care rarely seen on the secondary market. From its flawless original paintwork to its pristine, smoke-free interior, every detail remains in an impeccable state. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and offered in pristine condition. This specimen represents the zenith of its class, exhibiting a level of preservation that will satisfy the most discerning collector. Experience a drive that remains indistinguishable from its original showroom debut.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to pass this beauty along to its next owner. It is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot! I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. You won’t find a single scratch or hiccup here. If you're looking for total perfection, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you're going to love it!

Offering a concours-level E46 M3, a true masterpiece of naturally aspirated performance. This example features the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a precision-shifted ZF 6-speed manual gearbox. The drivetrain is anchored by a factory variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. Meticulously maintained, the chassis boasts a reinforced subframe and pristine bushings, while the dual-VANOS system has been professionally serviced for peak volumetric efficiency. With a flawless exterior and a cockpit devoid of wear, this vehicle remains in an uncompromising, factory-fresh state for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. Original paint. Smoke-free interior. Clean title in hand.

With remarkably low mileage and zero cosmetic or mechanical defects, this vehicle offers a driving experience identical to the day it first rolled off the lot. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such uncompromising caliber and aesthetic purity.

I've babied it from day one, so it’s spotless inside and out. It drives like a total dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for something that feels brand new, you've gotta see this one! Drop me a message and let's get

This E92 M3 represents a superlative example of the high-revving S65 V8 era. Featuring individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing, the powerplant delivers linear torque through a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains taut, equipped with Electronic Damper Control and a variable M differential lock for optimal lateral dynamics. Meticulously maintained with a documented service history, the vehicle exhibits zero rod bearing issues or subframe fatigue. The factory finish is flawless, preserving the aerodynamic integrity and aesthetic of this naturally aspirated masterpiece.
Used car. Mint condition. Clean title. No accidents. Full service history. Garage kept.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade specimen, meticulously maintained and presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, lustrous factory finish entirely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero bolster wear, and every switch, dial, and digital interface operates with crisp, factory-new precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history performed solely by authorized specialists. It delivers a driving experience that is tight, responsive, and indistinguishable from new, with a spotless engine bay and a pristine undercarriage. Included with the sale are all original keys, the full set of owner’s manuals, and a detailed folder of maintenance records. For the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality, this is an unparalleled opportunity to own the finest example available.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom state. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to superior preservation. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of unparalleled caliber and mechanical integrity.
